name: Friendship Starter - Sour Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. DISSOLVE THE YEAST IN 1/2 CUP WARM WATER.
2. STIR IN THE LUKEWARM WATER, FLOUR, SALT, AND SUGAR UNTIL SMOOTH.
3. LET THE MIXTURE STAND, UNCOVERED FOR 3 TO 5 DAYS AT ROOM TEMPERATURE.
4. STIR TWO OR THREE TIMES A DAY.
5. COVER WITH A CLOTH AT NIGHT.
6. WHEN READY, THE MIXTURE SHOULD SMELL YEASTY BUT NOT SOUR.
7. POUR OUT 1 CUP OF STARTER TO USE IN THE "FRIENDSHIP MIXTURE".
8. TO KEEP THE LEFTOVER STARTER FRESH, ADD 1/2 CUP WATER, 1/2 CUP FLOUR AND 1 TEASPOON SUGAR.
9. LET STAND FOR AT LEAST ONE DAY UNTIL BUBBLY AND WELL FERMENTED.
10. STORE IN THE REFRIGERATOR, COVERED FOR UP TO TEN DAYS.
11. USE WITHIN 10 DAYS TO MAKE ANOTHER FRIENDSHIP MIXTURE.
